description: Horizons Patch 3 (4 December 2024) — Changes and Improvements, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes and Improvements

subsections.heading: Albion Journal Missions

items.text: Collect 20 offspring in 10 minutes on a single island → Have offspring from 10 different animals

subsections.searchable_text: Albion Journal Missions Collect 20 offspring in 10 minutes on a single island → Have offspring from 10 different animals

subsections.heading: HUD Editor

items.text: Default Spells and their Transformation Spells are now always displayed

subitems.text: If Vanity Spells are in use, they will switch to the default spells while the HUD Editor is open

subsections.searchable_text: HUD Editor Default Spells and their Transformation Spells are now always displayed If Vanity Spells are in use, they will switch to the default spells while the HUD Editor is open

subsections.heading: Dynamic Encampments

items.text: Lair Maps in Solo Encampments are now hidden until the Encampment's objective has been completed by a player. Once completed, the Lair Map becomes visible to all players

subitems.text: This change does not affect Lair Maps in Group Encampments

subsections.searchable_text: Dynamic Encampments Lair Maps in Solo Encampments are now hidden until the Encampment's objective has been completed by a player. Once completed, the Lair Map becomes visible to all players This change does not affect Lair Maps in Group Encampments

subsections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: [Mobile] Adjusted Custom Button Slot hotkey assignments

subitems.text: ‘Recording Mode,’ ‘Walk Up,’ ‘Walk Down,’ ‘Walk Right,’ and ‘Walk Left’ can no longer be assigned to custom buttons
‘World Map’ and ‘Destiny Board’ can now be assigned

subsections.searchable_text: Other Changes [Mobile] Adjusted Custom Button Slot hotkey assignments ‘Recording Mode,’ ‘Walk Up,’ ‘Walk Down,’ ‘Walk Right,’ and ‘Walk Left’ can no longer be assigned to custom buttons ‘World Map’ and ‘Destiny Board’ can now be assigned

sections.searchable_text: Changes and Improvements Albion Journal Missions Collect 20 offspring in 10 minutes on a single island → Have offspring from 10 different animals HUD Editor Default Spells and their Transformation Spells are now always displayed Dynamic Encampments Lair Maps in Solo Encampments are now hidden until the Encampment's objective has been completed by a player. Once completed, the Lair Map becomes visible to all players Other Changes [Mobile] Adjusted Custom Button Slot hotkey assignments

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Frazzle has been outshined by Enigma Blade in DPS arcane builds, even in smaller group fights. We’ve increased its burst damage to make it more competitive, even if allies don’t take advantage of the powerful damage-amplifying component.

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs

subitems.text: Now reduces enemy defenses before dealing damage

subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Frazzle (all Arcane Staffs) Now reduces enemy defenses before dealing damage Damage: 103.11 → 125

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Ice Storm (Glacial Staff) Cast time: 1s → 0.5s Stand time: 0.5s → 0.3s Travel distance: 18m → 12m (1.2m/s → 0.8 m/s)

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Sacred Pulse (all Holy Staffs) Stand time: 0.5s → 0.3s

subsections.heading: War Gloves

subitems.text: 75% defense buff duration: Up to 1.2s → always 2s

subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Counter (all War Gloves) 75% defense buff duration: Up to 1.2s → always 2s Earth Crusher (Ravenstrike Cestus) No longer reflectable 0.5s Charge-up damage : 179 → 175 1s Charge-up damage : 190 → 185 1.5s Charge-up damage : 202 → 195 2s Charge-up damage : 214 → 205

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Ballista Support Fire (Royal Helmet) Cooldown: 40s → 30s

subsections.heading: Armors

subitems.text: 20% bonus damage based on opponents weapon → 10% bonus to all damage types

subsections.searchable_text: Armors Dynamic Defense (Jacket of Tenacity) 20% bonus damage based on opponents weapon → 10% bonus to all damage types

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Focused Run (Scholar Sandals) Energy per tick: 2.63 → 4 (max 26.3 → 40) Vengeful Sprint (Demon Boots) Cooldown: 40s → 30s

subsections.heading: Potions

subitems.text: Increased armor and magic resistance reduction by 50%
Added 30% movement speed buff for the duration of immunity only if CC or debuffs are removed
Added 35% healing reduction for 3s to all targets hit
Increased true damage to players and mobs by 25%

subsections.searchable_text: Potions Acid Potion (all Tiers) Increased armor and magic resistance reduction by 50% Cleansing Potion (Tiers 3.1 and above) Added 30% movement speed buff for the duration of immunity only if CC or debuffs are removed Hellfire Potion (all Tiers) Added 35% healing reduction for 3s to all targets hit Increased true damage to players and mobs by 25% Cooldown 60s → 90s Sticky Potion (all Tiers) Increased damage reduction by 50% Tornado in a Bottle (all Tiers) Radius: 3m → 4m Cooldown: 90s → 60s

subsections.heading: Misc

subitems.text: No longer stops moving on usage
No longer queues auto-attacks after casting

subsections.searchable_text: Misc Deflecting Spin (all Spears) No longer stops moving on usage Mimic (all Arcane Staffs) No longer queues auto-attacks after casting

We’ve increased its burst damage to make it more competitive, even if allies don’t take advantage of the powerful damage-amplifying component. sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where spells that activate at a certain health threshold would not be triggered by damage from potions
Fixed issue where mounting up immediately after casting an invisibility spell would not break the invisibility
Mend Wounds (all Armors): Fixed issue where it would sometimes override movement commands

subsections.searchable_text: Spell Fixes Fixed issue where spells that activate at a certain health threshold would not be triggered by damage from potions Fixed issue where mounting up immediately after casting an invisibility spell would not break the invisibility Mend Wounds (all Armors): Fixed issue where it would sometimes override movement commands

subsections.heading: Mob Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where Morgana Occultists in the Mists would not spawn bats after using their instant ability

subsections.searchable_text: Mob Fixes Fixed issue where Morgana Occultists in the Mists would not spawn bats after using their instant ability

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where search filters would reset after switching tabs in the Marketplace UI
Fixed issue where clicking a loadout shared in chat would also move the character to the clicked position
Fixed issue where the Building Management UI of some tiers of Guild Halls and Houses could not be opened while inside
Fixed issue where the Element Switch button could appear on invalid elements when opening the HUD Editor

subitems.text: This button is no longer available on Desktop

items.text: [MOBILE] Fixed issue where selected emotes in the Key Bindings settings would reset when selecting a Custom Button Slot
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where the on-screen keyboard obstructed the Loadouts dropdown in the Marketplace UI

subsections.searchable_text: UI Fixes Fixed issue where search filters would reset after switching tabs in the Marketplace UI Fixed issue where clicking a loadout shared in chat would also move the character to the clicked position Fixed issue where the Building Management UI of some tiers of Guild Halls and Houses could not be opened while inside Fixed issue where the Element Switch button could appear on invalid elements when opening the HUD Editor This button is no longer available on Desktop [MOBILE] Fixed issue where selected emotes in the Key Bindings settings would reset when selecting a Custom Button Slot [MOBILE] Fixed issue where the on-screen keyboard obstructed the Loadouts dropdown in the Marketplace UI

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where static Randomized Dungeon entrances in the Roads of Avalon would not be visible
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes

subsections.searchable_text: Other Fixes Fixed issue where static Randomized Dungeon entrances in the Roads of Avalon would not be visible Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
